nasb.text: Proclaim this among the nations: Prepare a war; rouse the mighty men! Let all the soldiers draw near, let them come up!

esv.text: Proclaim this among the nations: Consecrate for war; stir up the mighty men. Let all the men of war draw near; let them come up.

cnv.text: 你們要在列國中宣告以下這話： “你們要預備爭戰， 要激動勇士。 讓所有的戰士都近前來，讓他們都上去攻擊。

ccb.text: 你们去向万国宣告： “要召集勇士，征调军队， 前去打仗！
